title: feat(mcp): overhaul — dynamic registry, account tools, single-gateway cleanup (v2.1.0)
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: New tools for the swarm
gist.blurb: Our MCP server just leveled up with dynamic model registries and account tools. Your AI agents can now access dozens of new voices and video models without breaking a sweat.
gist.summary: The MCP server has been upgraded to v2.1.0, introducing dynamic model registries, expanded voice and video model access, and new account management tools.
gist.impact: Developers building AI agents can now access 9 video models, over 35 voices, and check their Pollen balance directly through the MCP tools.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee (wearing a tiny toolbelt) and the Monitor Robot looking at a glowing, expanding list of models (dynamic registry) on a retro terminal, representing the new tools and expanded model access for AI agents.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny toolbelt, standing next to a chunky monitor-headed robot in a warm hackerspace. The robot's CRT screen displays a glowing, scrolling list of new voices and video models. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny toolbelt, standing next to a chunky monitor-headed robot in a warm hackerspace.
